issues.sample: I’ve been having issues with the front end since I purchased the vehicle. The dealership had not diagnosed this issue yet in 3 years. It had caused my vehicle to be in the shop continuously, my front driver side tire is worn out. I had to replace all brakes and rotors after 2 yea

narrative.headline: What 2020 Bmw X6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 9 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (56% of reports).
